positive: A whimsical and stylish scene of a forest clearing at dawn. The central motif is a majestic, stylized fox sitting upright, looking inquisitively at a collection of glowing, bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate wildflowers. The background features stylized, interlocking silhouettes of birch trees and ferns, creating a sense of magical depth. The composition must be central, utilizing strong negative space for print appeal. Use a vibrant color palette with pops of neon teal, deep emerald green, and warm gold highlights, set against a muted charcoal background. Vector illustration style, highly detailed line art, graphic novel aesthetic, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
